audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. Finalized sidecars are stored by (slot, column) only—archiveBlocks (L64-65) explicitly uses getAllAncestorBlocks(finalizedCheckpoint) to archive ONLY canonical chain blocks. Non-finalized sidecars (L70-71) iterate headChain from getHeadRoot + getAllAncestorBlocks, which walks parent pointers backward from the current fork choice head, guaranteeing canonical chain membership.
